title: TTT Create
description: Make things with Create, use custom Enchants, craft custom Weapons, find overhauled Structures and More!
body:
This is a Custom Create Modpack for The Terrifying Temmies and anyone who wants to use it themselves.

This modpack was based around the Create mod and with some other mods that change the way you normally experience Minecraft like the Enchancement mod which completely revamps the enchantment system.

The modpack adds:
The Create Mod,
Removed old and added new Enchantments,
New custom weapons with custom abilities,
Overhauled structures such as the Stronghold, Nether Fortresses, Mineshafts and More!

Personally I made the modpack in a way which makes Minecraft a bit more fun and challenging for the experienced players but still fun and playable for less experienced people.

Important Notes are that there are custom mods in here which revamp minecraft a tiny bit more like a custom music disc mod and a mod that makes netherite a bit more difficult to craft.

Feel free to look into the config and change anything you'd like!
